# DJ Curly

> DJ Curly is a vinyl DJ based in Hersham, Surrey, UK, playing 70s and 80s soul, disco, boogie and funk on original records. He is a DJ for pub nights, weddings, birthdays, anniversaries and private parties in Hersham, Walton-on-Thames, Weybridge and across Surrey.

## Key facts

- Name: DJ Curly
- Based in: Hersham, Surrey, United Kingdom
- Music: 70s & 80s soul, disco, boogie and funk — original vinyl only (twin Technics 1210s, 7" and 12" records)
- Events: pub takeovers, weddings, milestone birthdays, anniversaries, private parties
- Area covered: Hersham, Walton-on-Thames, Weybridge and anywhere within a reasonable drive of Hersham (Surrey, UK)
- Residencies: Bricklayers Arms, Hersham (Vinyl Fridays — last Friday of every month) and The Flintgate, Weybridge

## Booking

- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/447773059559
- Email: hello@djcurly.co.uk
- Website booking form: https://djcurly.co.uk/#book

## Pages

- [Home](https://djcurly.co.uk/): the whole site — about, photo gallery, upcoming gigs, testimonials and booking form
